sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Press Release: Cohen & Steers Reports Results for First Quarter 2026
feed.summary: This press release from Cohen & Steers reports their financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The document would detail key financial metrics, performance highlights, and possibly commentary from company leadership regarding their achievements and outlook for the period.

feed.title: Piper Sandler reiterates Overweight on Ulta Beauty stock at $725
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has reiterated an Overweight rating and a $725 price target for Ulta Beauty following the company's Beauty World event, where analysts met with senior leadership. The company is focusing on brand building and scaling growth initiatives for 2026, expressing confidence in its double-digit earnings per share growth algorithm. Despite the stock trading at a P/E of 21.7, Piper Sandler views its valuation as reasonable at 19 times its 2026 price-to-earnings ratio, with the beauty sector remaining resilient.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) Stock Hits Record High as Insiders Cash Out
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) stock recently reached an all-time high of $69.77, marking a 111% increase over the past year, driven by strong copper demand, a Q4 earnings beat, and positive analyst upgrades. Despite this rally and bullish analyst sentiment, company insiders, including Chairman Richard Adkerson, have been cashing out significant amounts of shares. Institutional ownership remains high, with some firms like Wellington Management and Voya Investment Management substantially increasing their stakes.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Outperforms Market in First Quarter
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with net earnings of $141.6 million on revenue of $3.06 billion, outperforming the market amidst a "meaningfully different" freight environment. CEO Shelley Simpson attributed the success to disciplined execution, improved customer response, and a tightening truckload market due to regulatory enforcement and early demand gains. Most operating segments, especially Intermodal, showed revenue growth and improved operating income, positioning the company for recovery.

feed.title: Loop Capital Adjusts Price Target on Sherwin-Williams to $385 From $400, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Loop Capital has adjusted its price target for Sherwin-Williams (SHW) to $385, down from $400, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after other firms like Wells Fargo, UBS, Citigroup, Jefferies, Mizuho, RBC, and Argus have also revised their price targets for the company in recent weeks. The company is set to announce its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 28, 2026.

feed.title: Nisource stock hits all-time high at 48.81 USD
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. stock has reached an all-time high of $48.81, indicating strong performance with a 23.49% one-year change. The company has also announced strategic energy infrastructure agreements with Alphabet Inc. and Amazon Data Services, Inc., maintained dividend payments for 40 consecutive years, and received an "overweight" rating from KeyBanc.

feed.title: Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) Sets New 12-Month High Following Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Teradyne (NASDAQ: TER) reached a new 52-week high after JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its price target from $315 to $400, maintaining a neutral rating. The company surpassed quarterly earnings expectations with an EPS of $1.80 and revenue of $1.08 billion, prompting several analysts to increase their price targets, resulting in a "Moderate Buy" consensus. Teradyne currently has a market cap of $58.78 billion, a P/E ratio of 108.38, and institutional ownership of nearly 99.77%.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) Shares Gap Down on Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) shares gapped down following a Citigroup analyst downgrade, which lowered its price target from $67 to $62. Despite this, analyst sentiment remains mixed, with several firms recently raising targets or issuing upgrades while others maintain a more cautious outlook. The company recently announced an increased quarterly dividend and reported earnings that topped consensus estimates, although revenue was slightly below expectations.

feed.title: Supreme Court Sides With Chevron in Fight Over Wetlands Suits
feed.summary: The US Supreme Court ruled 8-0 in favor of Chevron Corp., allowing the company to move Louisiana's lawsuits concerning coastal wetlands erosion from state to federal court. The decision by Justice Clarence Thomas reverses a Fifth Circuit ruling, concluding that Chevron plausibly alleged its disputed activities were related to federal government work during World War II. Justice Samuel Alito recused himself due to a conflict of interest, and the case has been remanded for further proceedings.

feed.title: Freeport McMoRan stock hits all-time high at 69.77 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Freeport McMoRan stock reached an all-time high of $69.77, marking a 111.64% increase over the past year due to rising copper prices and strong global demand. Despite this milestone, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is currently overvalued, with a P/E ratio of 45.76. The company has also seen recent "Buy" ratings and price target increases from several analysts, including Goldman Sachs, Jefferies, and Raymond James.

feed.title: TD Cowen reiterates Knight Transportation stock rating on Q1 miss By Investing.com
feed.summary: TD Cowen has reiterated a Buy rating and a $60.00 price target for Knight Transportation (NYSE:KNX) despite the company pre-announcing first-quarter adjusted earnings per share of $0.09, which fell below TD Cowen's $0.22 estimate. The miss was attributed to non-recurring adverse claims, delayed warehousing business, and adverse tax decisions in Mexico. Excluding these one-time items, EPS would have been approximately $0.24, exceeding TD Cowen's estimate.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Kinder Morgan Price Target to $37 From $35, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has raised its price target for Kinder Morgan (KMI) to $37 from $35, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from the analyst firm on the oil and gas transportation company.

feed.title: Travelers stock rating reaffirmed at Outperform by BMO Capital
feed.summary: BMO Capital has reaffirmed its Outperform rating on Travelers Companies Inc. (NYSE:TRV) shares, anticipating a 1% to 3% rise in consensus estimates due to expected first-quarter 2026 reserve releases. While pricing deceleration in the commercial insurance market is expected to lead to a higher underlying loss ratio, the firm maintains a positive outlook. This reaffirmation follows Travelers' strong Q1 2026 financial results, which surpassed earnings and revenue expectations, yet other analysts like BofA Securities have maintained an Underperform rating citing missed earnings and negative premium growth.

feed.title: BMO cuts CMS Energy stock price target to $85 on gas rate case
feed.summary: BMO Capital has reduced its price target for CMS Energy (NYSE:CMS) to $85 from $86, while maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment follows the Michigan Public Service Commission Staff's initial brief in CMS Energy’s gas rate case, recommending a revenue requirement of $183 million, which is about 76% of the company's requested $240 million. Despite the price target cut, BMO Capital views the staff's position as constructive.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $80,000 of PHILLIPS 66 lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: PHILLIPS 66 (PSX) has disclosed $80,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q1 2026, focusing on issues related to shareholder proposals and proxy advisors. Recent insider trading shows more sales than purchases, while institutional investors have mixed activity. Wall Street analysts have issued both buy and sell ratings, with a median price target of $177.0.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $80,000 of THE BOEING COMPANY lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: A recent Lobbying Disclosure Act filing revealed that THE BOEING COMPANY disclosed $80,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q1 2026, focusing on issues such as FY26 Appropriations and NDAA. The article also details recent congressional stock trading, insider trading activity, and hedge fund movements related to BA stock, alongside current analyst ratings and price targets.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $590,000 of PALO ALTO NETWORKS INC. lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks Inc. (PANW) disclosed $590,000 in lobbying activity for Q1 2026, focusing on cybersecurity threats and funding for federal, state, local, and critical infrastructure networks, as well as AI and quantum computing policies. The article also details recent congressional stock trading, insider trading, hedge fund activity, analyst ratings, and price targets for PANW stock.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $620,000 of CSX CORPORATION lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: CSX Corporation has disclosed $620,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q1 2026, covering issues like cargo theft, AI, cybersecurity, and various transportation-related bills. The article also details recent congressional and insider stock trades for CSX, as well as institutional investor activity and analyst ratings.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $70,000 of AT&T SERVICES INC. lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: A new Lobbying Disclosure Act filing revealed that AT&T SERVICES INC. spent $70,000 on lobbying in Q1 2026, focusing on wireless interference, spectrum auction authority, and privacy legislation. The article also details recent congressional stock trading in T, showing 10 trades in the last 6 months (4 purchases, 6 sales), significant institutional investor activity with both additions and removals of shares, and recent analyst ratings including several buy recommendations and various price targets.

feed.title: Apple’s China Surge Shows Pricing Power Matters In A Supply Crunch – Retail Bulls Take Notice
feed.summary: Despite a decline in China's overall smartphone shipments in Q1 2026 due to supply constraints and rising component costs, Apple Inc. saw a 20% year-over-year increase in shipments, outpacing competitors. The company's premium pricing strategy and strong demand for the iPhone 17 lineup allowed it to absorb higher costs more effectively. Bank of America reiterated its bullish stance on Apple, highlighting its resilient services growth and healthy product cycle.

feed.title: M&T Bank price target raised to $235 from $233 at DA Davidson
feed.summary: DA Davidson raised its price target for M&T Bank (MTB) to $235 from $233, maintaining a Neutral rating, following better-than-expected Q1 results. The firm anticipates M&T Bank will continue aggressive share repurchases due to improved credit trends, including a decline in net charge-offs and criticized loans, and a lowered CET1 target.

feed.title: Is Brown & Brown (BRO) Attractive After A 40.9% One-Year Share Price Decline?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Brown & Brown (BRO) to determine if its current share price is attractive after a 40.9% decline over the last year. Using an Excess Returns analysis, the company appears undervalued with an estimated intrinsic value higher than its current share price. However, a Price vs Earnings comparison indicates it may be overvalued relative to Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio, suggesting a mixed valuation picture.

feed.title: How Mizuho’s Upgrade and CoreSite Momentum Could Reshape American Tower’s (AMT) Investment Narrative
feed.summary: Mizuho upgraded American Tower (AMT) from Neutral to Outperform, citing improved cell tower fundamentals and strong growth from its data center arm, CoreSite. This upgrade highlights the company's balance between its tower business and growing digital infrastructure, especially with robust leasing demand linked to 5G rollout. While the upgrade supports the short-term narrative, investors should also consider American Tower's debt coverage, earnings volatility, and CoreSite's ability to offset slower revenue growth without adding balance sheet strain.

feed.title: Cummins focuses on durability, efficiency and uptime for Canadian fleets with 2027 heavy-duty solutions at Truck World
feed.summary: Cummins is showcasing its 2027 heavy-duty platform and supporting technologies at Truck World Canada, emphasizing durability, efficiency, and uptime for Canadian fleets operating in demanding conditions. Key offerings include the 2027 X15 and new X10 engines, the Twin Module aftertreatment system, the RT 160 HE tandem drive axle, and Meritor braking solutions. The company also highlights its digital solutions for fleet management and its extensive Sales and Service network in Canada.

feed.title: Boeing Co Stock (BA) Moved Up by 4.27% on Apr 17: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Boeing Co (BA) stock increased by 4.27% on April 17, driven by positive company developments including accelerated factory hiring, an expanded satellite venture, and new orders for Chinook helicopters and 787 widebody aircraft. The company also outpaced a key competitor in Q1 2026 commercial aircraft deliveries, signaling strong business momentum despite ongoing concerns about delivery uncertainties and quality control issues. Analysts remain largely positive on the stock ahead of Q1 2026 financial results.

feed.title: Should Fortinet’s (FTNT) Earnings Beat and AI Security Focus Prompt a Rethink of Its Hold Rating?
feed.summary: Fortinet (FTNT) reported Q1 2026 earnings of US$0.53 per share, surpassing Wall Street forecasts for the fifth consecutive quarter. This earnings beat and the company's focus on AI-driven security and cloud services in FortiOS 8.0 challenge its current "Hold" rating, despite potential risks from a slowing hardware refresh cycle. Analysts project continued revenue and earnings growth for Fortinet, with some predicting a fair value of around $89.00, suggesting a slight upside.

feed.title: RBC Capital maintains Starbucks stock rating on valuation concerns By Investing.com
feed.summary: RBC Capital has reiterated a "Sector Perform" rating on Starbucks (NASDAQ: SBUX) with a $105.00 price target, despite expectations of a second-quarter revenue beat, citing concerns that buy-side expectations are too optimistic regarding year-over-year margin improvement. The firm believes the stock is currently overvalued, trading at 33.4 times forward earnings, which is 31.1% above its 10-year average. Other firms like Tigress Financial Partners, Deutsche Bank, and Jefferies have also provided recent updates, reflecting mixed sentiments on Starbucks' market position and strategic developments.

feed.title: Apple Upgraded as BNP Paribas Sees Path to Increase Market Share
feed.summary: BNP Paribas has upgraded Apple Inc. to outperform from neutral, citing the company's ability to leverage the recent increase in memory prices to gain smartphone market share. The analyst believes Apple can better absorb higher component costs, leading to an advantage in the consumer electronics sector.

feed.title: GE HealthCare, RadNet’s DeepHealth Expand Mammography Partnership
feed.summary: GE HealthCare and RadNet's DeepHealth have expanded their partnership to further innovate and commercialize AI-powered mammography tools for breast cancer solutions. This collaboration, which began in 2024, integrates DeepHealth’s AI workflow with GE HealthCare’s mammography system to enhance image interpretation and operational efficiency. The next phase will extend these solutions internationally and offer new Breast Suite applications, aiming for earlier cancer detection and more confident clinical decisions.

feed.title: Autoliv Posts Upbeat Q1 Results, Joins United Airlines, Royal Caribbean Cruises And Other Big Stocks Movi
feed.summary: Autoliv Inc. (NYSE: ALV) reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter financial results, excelling in both earnings per share ($2.05 vs. $1.89 consensus) and sales ($2.753 billion vs. $2.605 billion consensus), leading to an 8.4% stock surge. This positive performance contributed to a broader upward trend in U.S. markets on Friday, with other companies like Critical Metals Corp, American Bitcoin Corp, and various airline and cruise operators also experiencing significant gains. The article highlights several other companies that saw substantial increases in their stock prices during the same trading session.

feed.title: 14 Walmart stores across Greater Houston to get complete makeovers
feed.summary: Walmart is undertaking a significant remodel project for 72 stores across Texas, including 14 in the Greater Houston area, to modernize the shopping experience with updated layouts, technology, and services. These enhancements aim to offer faster, more convenient shopping, expanded pharmacy services, and elevated product selections with interactive displays. The initiative reflects Walmart's continued investment in the state, alongside similar remodels planned for over 650 Supercenters and Neighborhood Markets nationally.

feed.title: APA and Dow Inc. Stocks Fall Sharply as the Strait of Hormuz Reopens. Here’s Why.
feed.summary: Shares of APA Corp. and Dow Inc. experienced a sharp decline following the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. The Strait, a crucial maritime chokepoint, reopened as part of a temporary truce between Israel and Lebanon, which likely impacted oil prices and, consequently, the related stocks. APA Corp. and Occidental Petroleum had previously seen their stocks rise in tandem with oil prices after the Strait's closure.

feed.title: Mizuho Sees Strong Risk-Reward in Corbus Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. (CRBP) Near Cash Value
feed.summary: Mizuho has reiterated an Outperform rating and raised its price target for Corbus Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. (CRBP) from $39 to $40, citing an attractive risk-reward profile, especially with the stock trading near its cash value. The company anticipates three clinical data readouts in 2026, which are seen as significant catalysts. Additionally, Corbus has aligned with the U.S. FDA on a registration strategy for CRB-701, a drug for head and neck squamous cell carcinoma and cervical cancer, involving separate randomized controlled studies.

feed.title: STMicroelectronics, TXN get upgrades, while NXP Semiconductors cut at Mizuho
feed.summary: Mizuho upgraded STMicroelectronics (STM) to Outperform and Texas Instruments (TXN) to Neutral, citing factors like AI server power management demand and industrial recovery. Conversely, NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) was downgraded due to high inventory, muted auto demand, and limited AI data center exposure. Mizuho raised STM's price target to $48 from $32.

feed.title: Analog Devices stock hits all-time high at $363.29
feed.summary: Analog Devices Inc. (ADI) stock reached an all-time high of $363.29, reflecting robust performance and strong investor confidence. The company's growth is driven by increasing demand for its advanced technology solutions across various sectors. Analysts have a positive outlook, reiterating "Overweight" ratings and raising price targets, fueled by strong earnings and guidance, particularly in AI and data center segments.

feed.title: CAMP4 Therapeutics Corporation (NASDAQ:CAMP) Short Interest Down 14.2% in March
feed.summary: CAMP4 Therapeutics Corporation (NASDAQ:CAMP) experienced a 14.2% decrease in short interest during March, settling at 414,235 shares, representing about 1.2% of its outstanding shares. Despite this, the company reported disappointing quarterly earnings, missing analyst consensus with an EPS of ($0.87) against an expected ($0.31). Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $8.60, even as the company faces significant profitability challenges.

feed.title: Analog Devices stock hits all-time high at $363.29 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Analog Devices Inc. (ADI) stock reached an all-time high of $363.29, trading near its 52-week high with a market capitalization of $176.85 billion. The semiconductor company has seen a 105.24% increase over the past year, driven by strong demand for its technology and positive analyst ratings, with the company raising its dividend for 23 consecutive years. Analysts are optimistic about ADI's future prospects, citing strong performance in various sectors and upward revisions in earnings estimates.

feed.title: Cummins Stock (CMI) Opinions on Analyst Price Target Increases
feed.summary: Recent analyst upgrades for Cummins (CMI) stock, including increased price targets from Jefferies, Citi, and Wells Fargo, are generating investor optimism. This positive sentiment is fueled by strong demand for Cummins' engines and successful strategic deliveries, particularly to the Indian Navy, which points to revenue diversification. Insiders, however, have primarily been selling shares, while institutional investors show mixed activity, and members of Congress have made some purchases.

feed.title: Cardinal Health Stock (CAH) Opinions on Recent Dividend Payout
feed.summary: Investors on social media expressed satisfaction with Cardinal Health's recent dividend payout, highlighting CAH's reliability as an income stock. The company is also gaining attention on trader watchlists following positive quarterly results and is seen as a stable, blue-chip holding among income-seeking investors. The article further provides detailed financial data, insider trading activity, congressional stock movements, hedge fund holdings, government contracts, and analyst ratings for CAH.

feed.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust stock hits 52-week high at 110.98 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) stock has climbed to a new 52-week high of $110.98, demonstrating strong investor confidence with a 22.8% one-year total return and a 4.11% dividend yield. Despite being considered overvalued by InvestingPro, the company recently reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, acquired a shopping center for $72.3 million, and is progressing a $400 million residential development pipeline. The company also announced the promotion of Jeff Kreshek to Executive Vice President, Western Region President & Chief Operating Officer.

feed.title: Short Interest in Brilliant Earth Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:BRLT) Drops By 15.1%
feed.summary: Short interest in Brilliant Earth Group (NASDAQ:BRLT) decreased by 15.1% in March, falling to 143,182 shares. The company recently missed earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of -$0.06 against an anticipated $0.02, and revenue of $124.41 million, slightly below estimates. Analysts have a "Reduce" consensus rating with an average target price of $1.74 for BRLT.

feed.title: JB Hunt sees opportunity for intermodal growth
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt's intermodal segment saw a significant 21% year-over-year increase in operating income, driven by a 3% volume gain and improved productivity, marking the first YoY improvement in both metrics since Q3 2022. The company, which recorded a weekly volume record of over 46,000 loads in March, aims to leverage its existing network capacity, believing it can support up to 20% more volume. This growth strategy is buoyed by rising fuel costs and tightening trucking capacity, which make intermodal rail options more appealing to customers.

feed.title: Kimco Realty Corp stock hits 52-week high at $23.92 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Kimco Realty Corp (KIM) stock has reached a new 52-week high of $23.92, reflecting a strong performance with a 20.91% total return over the past 12 months and an 18.48% gain year-to-date. The company offers a 4.38% dividend yield and has maintained dividend payments for 35 consecutive years. Analysts have increased price targets for Kimco due to strong Q4 2025 results and positive leasing developments for 2026.

feed.title: Air Products to Showcase Industrial Decarbonization Solutions at the Canadian Hydrogen Convention in Edmonton, Alberta
feed.summary: Air Products will showcase its innovative hydrogen technologies and expertise for industrial decarbonization and heavy-duty transportation at the Canadian Hydrogen Convention in Edmonton, Alberta. Company experts will present on a breakthrough hydrogen boiler burner technology and a portable liquid-to-gaseous hydrogen fueler. Air Products has significant operations and ongoing construction of a net-zero hydrogen energy complex in the Edmonton region.

feed.title: IT Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) for alleged securities fraud, encouraging investors who purchased Gartner securities between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, to contact the firm. The lawsuit claims Gartner made false and misleading statements regarding seasonality risks, growth potential in contract value, and improved business with "tariff impacted companies," despite actual declining CV growth. Investors have until May 18, 2026, to participate as lead plaintiffs.

feed.title: Textron Inc. stock (US8832031027): Is aviation strength now the key to beating industrials peers?
feed.summary: Textron Inc. (US8832031027) is positioned for steady growth in the industrials sector due to its strong aviation and defense segments, which provide a buffer against economic downturns and benefit from rising U.S. military spending. The company's diversified model, emphasizing high-margin aftermarket services and critical markets like military helicopters and business jets, offers reliable returns for investors globally. However, risks such as supply chain bottlenecks, commercial aviation softness, and competition from major players like Boeing and Lockheed remain factors to monitor.

feed.title: Wyoming co-op taps battery-solar system to cut power costs by $1M
feed.summary: PowerSecure, a subsidiary of Southern Company, is partnering with Powder River Energy Corporation (PRECorp) and NRTC to develop a 5 MW battery and 1.25 MWdc solar system in Moorcroft, Wyoming. This project, expected to be operational by 2027, aims to strengthen rural grid resiliency, manage peak demand, and provide backup during outages. It is projected to reduce PRECorp's annual wholesale power costs by up to $1 million, benefiting its members through increased reliability and long-term affordability.

feed.title: From boilers to truck fueling, Air Products brings hydrogen tech to Edmonton
feed.summary: Air Products (NYSE: APD) is set to showcase its hydrogen decarbonization solutions at the Canadian Hydrogen Convention in Edmonton, Alberta, on April 21-22, 2026. The company will present innovative technologies, including a breakthrough boiler burner for low-NOx performance and a portable liquid-to-gaseous hydrogen fueler designed to accelerate zero-emission transportation across Canada. Air Products currently operates several hydrogen facilities in Alberta and Ontario and is constructing a net-zero hydrogen energy complex in Edmonton, which will feature Western Canada's only liquid hydrogen production facility.

feed.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust stock hits 52-week high at 110.98 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) stock has surged to a new 52-week high of $110.98, driven by a 22.8% 1-year total return and a consistent 4.11% dividend yield. Despite this strong performance and recent positive financial results and strategic acquisitions, InvestingPro data suggests the stock might be overvalued. The company recently reported Q4 2025 EPS of $1.48 and revenue of $336.05 million, exceeding expectations, and acquired Congressional North Shopping Center for $72.3 million.

feed.title: D.A. Davidson reiterates KeyCorp stock Buy rating on strong growth
feed.summary: D.A. Davidson has reiterated its Buy rating and a $26.00 price target for KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) shares, citing the company's strong growth and undervalued stock. KeyCorp reported 31% EPS growth in 2025 and 33% year-over-year growth in Q1 2026, leading its peer group and prompting upward revisions in net interest income guidance and anticipated share repurchases. Analysts from RBC Capital, BofA Securities, and Jefferies have also raised their price targets for KeyCorp due to solid financial performance and strategic initiatives.
